Class HttpClientSslConfigurer

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.config.AbstractSslConfigurer<reactor.netty.http.client.HttpClient, reactor.netty.http.client.HttpClient>
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.config.HttpClientSslConfigurer
